title: Cobblesafari + Raid Den Compat
description: Cobblesafari and Raid Den add-on that adds random raids to the Dungeon Portail destination. Example of the Cobblesafari API
body:
This is a straightforward compat mod that adds Raid den from NecroSo1 to the dungeon pool of CobbleSafari. 
This is an example of usage of the Cobblesafari API to add new dungeons to the dungeon pool.

Made for CobbleSafari 0.1.3+ and Cobblemon Raid Den 0.7.6. It will not work with earlier versions of Cobblesafari (the api didn't exist yet) and might not work with others versions of Raid Den.

If you encounter any issue, please do not bother NecroSo1, as this is most certainly not an issue with Raid Den.
